college_info.intro:
Ganpat University popular programmes are BTech and MBA. The university offers BTech specialisation in Computer Science & Engineering, Cyber Security, Automobile, Biomedical, Electrical, Mechanical, Marine, Petrochemical, and others. Ganpat University Mehsana BTech students are placed in top companies in various sectors. Btech students can work as Automotive Engineers, Cyber Security Analysts, Forensic Analysts, Chief Research Managers, and others.
Ganpat University Kherva is one of the eminent universities. The university offers an MBA specialisation in Agribusiness, Financial Services, Pharmaceuticals, Business Analytics, Healthcare and Hospital, and others. MBA students can seek higher education and work as Agribusiness Marketing Officers, Financial Advisors, Development Managers, Health Administrators, and others. Candidates can check some of the popular programmes offered at Ganpat University in the following table:
Check out more details in the below video:

placements.overview: Ganpat University placement 2025 has not been released. The university has a placement cell which helps the students to attain good jobs in various sectors. The campus provides practical training to stimulate real-life experience. The highest and average package offered during Ganpat University placements 2024 stood at INR 19.68 LPA and INR 4.05 LPA, respectively. With a 100% intenship rate at Ganpat University, a few key highlights of Ganpat University placements 2024 are presented below:

student_insights.feedback: Students can work with faculty on research projects
Offered in the final year only
Many students started their own start-ups
Higher in core jobs
Majority opted in outside India
Organized & proactive placement process
Strong alumni network that help with placement opportunities
Very Active and resourceful, college is also involved
Love being in college

Ganpat University is a private university that was founded in 2005 and is recognised by the UGC.The tuition at this university ranges from INR 12,000 to INR 7 lakh, depending on the course. This university selects students based on merit and the results of national level exams such as JEE, CAT, GATE, MAT, XMAT, CMAT, and so on.The tuition for Ganpat University Engineering degrees ranges from INR 2,00,000 to INR 5,24,823.The BA (Economics) Course fee is around INR 1,51,374, the BBA Course fee is approximately Rs. 1,80,000, the BCA Course fee is approximately Rs. 40,572, and the B.Pharma Course charge is approximately Rs. 3,56,000.Fees for UG and PG Business Administration programs will range from INR 97,000 and INR 1,89,110 per year.Ganpat University charges INR 40,040 for the M.Phil Course, and INR 1,90,000 for the MBA Course in various specialties.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechatronics Engineering - Batch of 2029
reviews_list.review_title: Nice college, it is value for money.

review_content.Placements: The placement scene depends a bit on the course, but overall, the university puts in real effort. Big companies do come, and many students get placed or at least get internship opportunities that help them gain exposure.
review_content.Infrastructure: Hostel and campus life are one of the highlights. The infrastructure is quite solid. Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library, sports grounds, everything is there and maintained decently. The hostel feels safe, the environment is student-friendly, and the mess food is, well, not perfect, but definitely manageable. The campus feels like a small town of its own, which makes college life more memorable.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. (Hons.) in Microbiology - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Ganpat University (GUNI) Microbiology student.

review_content.Placements: Only a few placements are available in this course, which is why there are no placements after Microbiology. If anyone wants a job, they need to complete PG to get a job easily. There is no information about the highest package and average package. Many hospital and lab companies are interested in this field.
review_content.Infrastructure: Hostel is not a good option. PG is better. Food in the mess is good, but there is no Wi-Fi in the hostel. There are rules in the hostel, and security guards are strict. The quality of food is bad.
review_content.Faculty: Our faculty helps us before exams, and exams are very simple. We get 80% as well, and many students get 90 to 98%. We have three exams. The first is the mid-semester exam, which is offline. The second is the online mid exam. The third is the final exam, which is offline. Exams are nicely organized by the university with very good arrangements. Our faculty is very good and supports us everywhere.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Biotechnology - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: It has average placements, good infrastructure, and a strong academic focus.

review_content.Placements: Placements are average, and about 65-70% of students get placed. Packages are often too low. We need to apply for jobs or internships on our own, as the college support is limited and the offered pay is generally low. I suggest students be independent when it comes to placements.
review_content.Infrastructure: The campus offers average labs, classrooms, hostel facilities, and a library. Sports facilities are not up to the mark. The food quality can improve. The hotel's condition is very average. There is only 1 bathroom and 1 washroom for 8 people. Students have no choice.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Automobile Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: My honest review of life at Ganpat University.

review_content.Placements: When it comes to placements, the placement cell provides proper training through seminars, soft-skill sessions, and industry interactions. Many reputed companies visit the campus, especially for engineering streams, and the opportunities are increasing year by year.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of Ganpat University is one of its strongest points. The campus is spacious and well-maintained with modern classrooms, advanced laboratories, a central library with digital resources, sports grounds, and Wi-Fi facilities across the campus. The automobile engineering labs are equipped with the latest tools and machinery, which helps a lot in gaining practical knowledge.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma (IT) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: The college is very good, it teaches us so many things like studies, people, environment, and all.

review_content.Placements: 40% of students have been placed in our course. The highest package is 5 LPA, the lowest package is 1 LPA, and the average package is 2 LPA. Top recruiting companies are TCS, Infosys, and Reliance. 40% of students got internships in our course, with companies like TCS, Woot, and Infosys. Software developer, data analyst, and IT support specialist are the roles offered in our course.
review_content.Infrastructure: Firstly, we have well-maintained classrooms, labs, and a library. We have students' personal Wi-Fi connections to connect it, but we have to enter our enrollment number. Hostels are well-maintained and give very energetic vibes. The quality of food in the canteen and mess is very hygienic. The college provides 24/7 medical support. Every semester, we have tournaments for sports activities and games.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: It has good placements, helpful faculty, relevant curriculum, but some facilities need improvement.

review_content.Placements: For the passing batch of B.Tech in Computer Engineering at Ganpat University around 75-80 percent of students got placed. The package offered ranges from 3-15 LPA. The top recruiting companies for our course are TCS Infosys and Wipro. About 50-60 percent of students gained internships. Common roles offered are software development testing and network engineering.
review_content.Infrastructure: Ganpat University offers well equipped labs Wi fi enabled classrooms and a modern library for academic needs. Hostel facilities are decent with hygienic food medical care and sports amenities providing a comfortable environment for students. However some facilities should be further improved to enhance students' comfort.

The automobile engineering labs are equipped with the latest tools and machinery, which helps a lot in gaining practical knowledge.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma (IT) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: The college is very good, it teaches us so many things like studies, people, environment, and all.

content.Placements: 40% of students have been placed in our course. The highest package is 5 LPA, the lowest package is 1 LPA, and the average package is 2 LPA. Top recruiting companies are TCS, Infosys, and Reliance. 40% of students got internships in our course, with companies like TCS, Woot, and Infosys. Software developer, data analyst, and IT support specialist are the roles offered in our course.
content.Infrastructure: Firstly, we have well-maintained classrooms, labs, and a library. We have students' personal Wi-Fi connections to connect it, but we have to enter our enrollment number. Hostels are well-maintained and give very energetic vibes. The quality of food in the canteen and mess is very hygienic. The college provides 24/7 medical support. Every semester, we have tournaments for sports activities and games.

admission_overview.college_name: Ganpat University Admission 2025: Application Process, Eligibility, Courses, Fees

paragraphs: Ganpat University admissionto courses is both merit-based and entrance-based. Candidates seeking admission can either get direct admission to their desired course or through any relevant national/ state-level entrance tests such as GUCET, CUET, CAT, MAT, JEE Main, etc. Apart from the aforementioned entrance exams, the University also accepts Pearson Undergraduate Entrance Exam scores for admission to all UG courses. For an MBA, the University conducts an additional selection round of personal interviews before shortlisting candidates for admission.

Ganpat University (GUNI)offers more than 171 courses at undergraduate, postgraduate and diploma levels. It also offers a range of certificate courses. Ganpat University has seven faculties focused onEngineering,Management,Pharmacy,Computer Applications,Sciences,Social Sciences,Architecture,Design and Planning, Law, and Maritime Studies.

The basic eligibility for admission to most courses at Ganpat University is merit in the last qualifying examination; however, the university accepts the scores of various entrance exams conducted at the national and state levels for admission to several courses.
The table below presents the application status of variousGanpat University coursesalong with the eligibility, and accepted entrance exams:
Eligibility
Class 12 with 45% aggregate in Science stream
Class 10 and Class 12 with Physics and Chemistry
CUET/GUJCET
Class 10 and Class 12 50% marks (45% in case of candidates belonging to reserved category)
NATA/ Direct admission
Class 10 and Class 12 in any stream with 45% marks (40% in case of candidates belonging to reserved category)
NATA,UCEED,GNUDAT
Bachelor's degree
CMAT,MAT,XAT,CAT,ATMA+ Personal Interview
Bachelor’s degree
GATE,GUJCET
Bachelor’s degree with 50% marks (45% marks in case of candidates belonging to reserved category)
Direct Admission
Make your selection here,to check the eligibility and selection criteria for other Ganpat University courses.

The Ganpat University admission process is conducted in multiple steps. The process begins with the release of application forms on the official website of the University, followed by the shortlisting of candidates based on their educational qualifications and scores in the entrance exam. The final step includes acceptance of the admission offer by the candidate. The candidates must check the eligibility criteria before applying to their desired course.
Interested candidates can read the detailed admission process below:
Step 1: Ganpat University Application Process
The Ganpat University application forms are released on the University's official website. Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria must fill out the application form before the deadline.
Step 2: Shortlisting of Candidates

Ganpat University admission criteria are both entrance-based and merit-based for all courses. The University accepts various entrance exams such as CAT, XAT, MAT, JEE, Pearson UG test, etc. to shortlist admission candidates.
Step 3: Final Admission
Shortlisted candidates are required to pay the admission fees and appear for the document verification process to secure their seats.

placement_data.title: Ganpat University Placement Overview 2024
paragraphs: The highest and average package offered during Ganpat University placements 2024 stood at INR 19.68 LPA and INR 4.05 LPA , respectively. Further, 864 companies approached for placements and 5,606 jobs were offered during placement drive 2024. Apart from this, the internship rate recorded during GUNI placements 2024 was 100%. Moreover, according to Engineering and Management NIRF report 2024 released by the University, the median package offered during BTech and MBA placements 2023 stood at INR 4 LPA and INR 3.75 LPA , respectively.

faqs.question: How much does MBA at Ganpat University cost?
faqs.answer: Ganpat University Fee Structure 2023: The official website lists the fees for UG, PG, and Ph.D. degree courses such as BBA, BCA, Bcom, Mtech with specialization, and many others. The institution charges moderate tuition for these courses. The fee structure for all of Ganpat University's courses is stated below in the article. Students who want to apply for any UG, PG, Diploma, or Doctoral level study can find the complete list of Ganpat University Courses & Fees as well as the duration of the course here. The address of Ganpat University is Kherva, Mehsana, Gujarat, India. The Mehsana District Education Foundation manages it. Ganpat University is a private university that was founded in 2005 and is recognised by the UGC. The tuition at this university ranges from INR 12,000 to INR 7 lakh, depending on the course. This university selects students based on merit and the results of national level exams such as JEE, CAT, GATE, MAT, XMAT, CMAT, and so on. The tuition for Ganpat University Engineering degrees ranges from INR 2,00,000 to INR 5,24,823. The BA (Economics) Course fee is around INR 1,51,374, the BBA Course fee is approximately Rs. 1,80,000, the BCA Course fee is approximately Rs. 40,572, and the B.Pharma Course charge is approximately Rs. 3,56,000. Fees for UG and PG Business Administration programs will range from INR 97,000 and INR 1,89,110 per year. Ganpat University charges INR 40,040 for the M.Phil Course, and INR 1,90,000 for the MBA Course in various specialties. At Ganpat University, the Ph.D. course costs approximately INR 75,200. Ganpat University charges INR 3,000 for the PhD entrance exam. The application cost for Ganpat University is INR 1,000.

faqs.answer: Once Ganpat University releases the admission letters for the BPharma course, students who are offered admission must pay the first installment of the first-year fees. In general, students are required to pay an admission fee and some part of the tuition fees. Students willing to know more can visit the university's official website.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2029Offered by U.V. Patel College of Engineering, Ganpat UniversityReviewed on 9 Dec 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Nice college, it is value for money.
reviews.review_text: Hostel and campus life are one of the highlights. The infrastructure is quite solid. Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library, sports grounds, everything is there and maintained decently. The hostel feels safe, the environment is student-friendly, and the mess food is, well, not perfect, but definitely manageable. The campus feels like a small town of its own, which makes college life more memorable.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Ganpat University (GUNI) Microbiology student.
reviews.review_text: Hostel is not a good option. PG is better. Food in the mess is good, but there is no Wi-Fi in the hostel. There are rules in the hostel, and security guards are strict. The quality of food is bad.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2028Offered by U.V. Patel College of Engineering, Ganpat UniversityReviewed on 12 May 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It has average placements, good infrastructure, and a strong academic focus.
reviews.review_text: The campus offers average labs, classrooms, hostel facilities, and a library. Sports facilities are not up to the mark. The food quality can improve. The hotel's condition is very average. There is only 1 bathroom and 1 washroom for 8 people. Students have no choice.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by U.V. Patel College of Engineering, Ganpat UniversityReviewed on 20 Aug 2025)
reviews.review_heading: My honest review of life at Ganpat University.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of Ganpat University is one of its strongest points. The campus is spacious and well-maintained with modern classrooms, advanced laboratories, a central library with digital resources, sports grounds, and Wi-Fi facilities across the campus. The automobile engineering labs are equipped with the latest tools and machinery, which helps a lot in gaining practical knowledge.

reviews.review_heading: The college is very good, it teaches us so many things like studies, people, environment, and all.
reviews.review_text: Firstly, we have well-maintained classrooms, labs, and a library. We have students' personal Wi-Fi connections to connect it, but we have to enter our enrollment number. Hostels are well-maintained and give very energetic vibes. The quality of food in the canteen and mess is very hygienic. The college provides 24/7 medical support. Every semester, we have tournaments for sports activities and games.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by U.V. Patel College of Engineering, Ganpat UniversityReviewed on 4 May 2025)
reviews.review_heading: It has good placements, helpful faculty, relevant curriculum, but some facilities need improvement.
reviews.review_text: Ganpat University offers well equipped labs Wi fi enabled classrooms and a modern library for academic needs. Hostel facilities are decent with hygienic food medical care and sports amenities providing a comfortable environment for students. However some facilities should be further improved to enhance students' comfort.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by U.V. Patel College of Engineering, Ganpat UniversityReviewed on 10 Jun 2025)

Classrooms are not so good, they are non-AC and not well managed. But the library is big, so all books are easily available. The hostel facility is the best, and the mess food is of good quality. Also, good quality medical facilities, sports, and games are available.

reviews.review_heading: College batch 2023-25 in finance service.
reviews.review_text: Campus is very big. Sports activities are also included and they have good healthcare sector.

reviews.review_heading: Life changing decision.
reviews.review_text: In my course, classrooms have good infrastructure with air-conditioning. There are Wi-Fi, computer labs, etc. In the case of Ahmedabad they don't have a hostel and canteen. For sports, they have indoor games like table tennis, carrom, chess, etc.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2027Offered by U.V. Patel College of Engineering, Ganpat UniversityReviewed on 21 Jan 2025)
reviews.review_heading: All about college, infrastructure, placements, and faculty.
reviews.review_text: Yes, we have the best infrastructure with on-campus hostels for boys and girls, including Wi-Fi and hot showers. We get three meals a day and have access to a cricket ground, football ground, swimming pool, boxing ring, gym, and sports complex for extra-curricular activities.

reviews.review_heading: Overall I will say Excellent in Faculty, Syllabus, etc. Absolutely satisfied with placement.
reviews.review_text: In our university, the facility is outstanding. There are sports grounds for all sports: tennis, football, cricket, running track, etc., a swimming pool, gym, classrooms with Wi-Fi, labs, and a library for all departments, etc. They have provided different hostels for different branches. The food quality is also very nice and not so costly. Also, for out-of-state students, there is a different canteen.

college_info.college_name: Ganpat University Scholarship Details

paragraphs: Ganpat University offers UG and PG courses across various streams such as Engineering, Science, Management, and others. The university fee structure has been discussed below:

Once Ganpat University releases the admission letters for the BPharma course, students who are offered admission must pay the first installment of the first-year fees. In general, students are required to pay an admission fee and some part of the tuition fees. Students willing to know more can visit the university's official website.

Yes, Ganpat University (GUNI) offers 100% tuition waiver for students in certain programs, as well as scholarships for other students. Students must serve as researchers for GUNI for a minimum of two years after earning their Ph.D. to receive the 100% tuition waiver. Students in reserved categories, such as SC or ST, may also receive a scholarship. GUNI also offers the Merit Scholarship to undergraduate and postgraduate students who ranks first to third in their semester results. For female students, GUNI offers the PRAGATI Scholarship Scheme, which provides 50,000 rupees or 50% tuition fees, whichever is less, to two girls per family with an annual family income of less than 8 Lacs rupees.

Ganpat University Fee Structure 2023: The official website lists the fees for UG, PG, and Ph.D. degree courses such as BBA, BCA, Bcom, Mtech with specialization, and many others. The institution charges moderate tuition for these courses. The fee structure for all of Ganpat University's courses is stated below in the article. Students who want to apply for any UG, PG, Diploma, or Doctoral level study can find the complete list of Ganpat University Courses & Fees as well as the duration of the course here.

The address of Ganpat University is Kherva, Mehsana, Gujarat, India. The Mehsana District Education Foundation manages it. Ganpat University is a private university that was founded in 2005 and is recognised by the UGC.

The tuition at this university ranges from INR 12,000 to INR 7 lakh, depending on the course. This university selects students based on merit and the results of national level exams such as JEE, CAT, GATE, MAT, XMAT, CMAT, and so on.

The tuition for Ganpat University Engineering degrees ranges from INR 2,00,000 to INR 5,24,823.The BA (Economics) Course fee is around INR 1,51,374, the BBA Course fee is approximately Rs. 1,80,000, the BCA Course fee is approximately Rs. 40,572, and the B.Pharma Course charge is approximately Rs. 3,56,000.Fees for UG and PG Business Administration programs will range from INR 97,000 and INR 1,89,110 per year.Ganpat University charges INR 40,040 for the M.Phil Course, and INR 1,90,000 for the MBA Course in various specialties.At Ganpat University, the Ph.D. course costs approximately INR 75,200. Ganpat University charges INR 3,000 for the PhD entrance exam.The application cost for Ganpat University is INR 1,000.

faqs.question: Which courses are available at Veer Surendra Sai Institute of Medical Sciences and Research for students?
faqs.answer: Courses offered by Veer Surendra Sai Institute of Medical Sciences and Research are MD, MS, MBBS, B.Sc., GNM. These courses are in the stream of Nursing, Medicine & Health Sciences. Veer Surendra Sai Institute of Medical Sciences and Research offers specializations such as MD specializations in Community Medicine, Anaesthesia, Biochemistry, Dermatology, General Medicine, Microbiology, Pediatrics, Pathology, Physiology, Radiology, Anatomy, MS specializations in Obstetrics & Gynecology, Ophthalmology, ENT, General Surgery, Orthopaedics, GNM specializations in General Nursing & Midwifery.

placements.overview:
Veer Surendra Sai Institute of Medical Sciences and Research is a public institute and is located in Sambalpur, Orissa. Veer Surendra Sai Institute of Medical Sciences and Research courses are offered to students at the UG and PG levels. The institute is approved by NMC and INC and offers courses in Full Time mode. Veer Surendra Sai Institute of Medical Sciences and Research offers a total of 25 courses in streams such as Medicine & Health Sciences and Nursing. Some of the popular courses offered at the institute are B.Sc., M.Sc., MD, MS and MBBS and the total seat intake for the available courses is 496. These courses are offered to students across several specialisations such as Anaesthesia, Anatomy, Biochemistry, Community Medicine and Community Medicine Nursing. Further, the fee for all these courses ranges between INR 1,05,000 to 1,72,575. Apart from this, the Veer Surendra Sai Institute of Medical Sciences and Research campus has a state-of-the-art infrastructure with all the advanced facilities.

Veer Surendra Sai Institute of Medical Sciences and Research offers various programmes at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time courses from plethora of streams such as Medicine & Health Sciences and Nursing. At the UG level, students can choose from courses, namely B.Sc., MBBS and GNM. On the other hand, at the PG level, the Veer Surendra Sai Institute of Medical Sciences and Research offers M.Sc., MD and MS. The fees for Veer Surendra Sai Institute of Medical Sciences and Research courses range between INR 1,05,000 to 1,72,575.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: So, overall, the college is good.

review_content.Placements: Currently, I am pursuing my MBBS 2nd year at VIMSAR. Well, it's a top government college in Odisha, so you need to pass the cutoff mark, which may vary year to year. But after passing from this college, you will certainly become a doctor. And during the internship, you will get a good salary too.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is quite average because it's a 70-year-old college. All the hostels and the college campus have become very old. The hospital is also not in very good condition; every time some sort of repair work goes on in our college, but still, it is not enough, as the work is fully neglected.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: I am very much satisfied with MBBS. It is very hard in Burla, so you need to study every day.

review_content.Placements: So we are doing MBBS, and after the 4.5-year, a 1-year stipend of Rs.50,000 per month. After completing MBBS, you can get around Rs.90,000 to Rs.1,00,000 per month. In my batch, everyone gets a job as we are doctors. So, if I talk about doctors, there is almost a 100% guarantee of getting a job in the future.
review_content.Infrastructure: If I talk about infrastructure, it is good, not like other big colleges, but it is good for a government college. The lecture theatres are well maintained. They are highly modern and air-conditioned. There are air purifiers, and there are labs like biochemistry labs and all kinds of labs, whichever subject is required. Now, if I talk about hostels, they are average, with a mess, and the medical facilities are well. We are doctors, so we know medical practices. The hospital is open 24 hours for us. Hospital facilities are A1 but need some cleanliness inside the hostel and hospital.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Nursing - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: No permanent faculty is there in our college.

review_content.Placements: Placements are good in our college, but we need to study in a proper and efficient way. We have duty hours of 4 hours, which is now the training period. In this period, we are not getting any stipend and we are working a lot during the day and night, which needs to be changed.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is bad. The college campus is not so good. And also, the hostel campus is not so good. There is no boys hostel and in girls hostel, not sufficient place are there to stay, and also girls hostel infrastructure is not so good.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Glorious college, i.e. Veer Surendra Sai.

review_content.Placements: 80 to 90% students got placed from our college every year. The highest package is about 30 to 25 LPA. Good internship opportunities are available from our college. There are paid internships and unpaid too.
review_content.Infrastructure: Hostel and college fee is very affordable. All the faculty members are very talented and good at teaching. Wi-Fi is available all the time in hostel as well. The classrooms have very good condition. The faculty members are highly qualified. Food is provided in our college canteen.
review_content.Faculty: The teachers of our college are very helpful and dedicated towards their job. They are very friendly and they are highly qualified. Our course is highly relevant and very good for future demand. The exams are not so difficult and not even easy.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Overall a good college. Infrastructure can still improve though.

review_content.Placements: As a medical college, Vimsar provides education to it's best and many students get PG seats all over. Well paid. Facilities like books and easy contact to faculty members for PG preparation is there. PG seniors also help a lot. Tuitions are available. Lot of learning and better job opportunities.
review_content.Infrastructure: Almost all the facilities are present like gym, football ground, badminton court, canteen, Wi-Fi facility, library and many more. Mess is average. Sometimes below average. But canteen provides better food. Better grounds and gym are present. AC and WIFI in library is present.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Nursing - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Still, there are lot of thing to change.

review_content.Placements: 70%-80% placed in this course. Starting salary goes around Rs. 29,000 and then it increases with time up to Rs. 90,000. In this course, the student can work at AIIMS and other state government medical hospitals and private hospitals either as a tutor in medical nursing college or nursing staff.
review_content.Infrastructure: Almost everything is available, but maintenance is very poor. The library is available. Food quality is moderate not so good not so bad. There is no sports facility here. If students want, they can join NCC. Skill labs, library, halls computer labs are available for study purposes.

overview_faqs.question: Can Veer Surendra Sai Institute of Medical Sciences and Research be considered as a reputed Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: The flagship courses offered at Veer Surendra Sai Institute of Medical Sciences and Research are MD, MS, MBBS, B.Sc., GNM. The Institute has experienced faculty offering the best education to students. On the basis of Shiksha verified reviews, Veer Surendra Sai Institute of Medical Sciences and Research has a rating of 3.8 by students. The college's campuslife, placements, faculty and Infrastructure has been rated as 3, 4.3, 3.7 and 4 as per reviews by students.

review_summary.college_name: Veer Surendra Sai Institute of Medical Sciences and Research Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: So, overall, the college is good.

content.Placements: Currently, I am pursuing my MBBS 2nd year at VIMSAR. Well, it's a top government college in Odisha, so you need to pass the cutoff mark, which may vary year to year. But after passing from this college, you will certainly become a doctor. And during the internship, you will get a good salary too.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is quite average because it's a 70-year-old college. All the hostels and the college campus have become very old. The hospital is also not in very good condition; every time some sort of repair work goes on in our college, but still, it is not enough, as the work is fully neglected.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: I am very much satisfied with MBBS. It is very hard in Burla, so you need to study every day.

content.Placements: So we are doing MBBS, and after the 4.5-year, a 1-year stipend of Rs.50,000 per month. After completing MBBS, you can get around Rs.90,000 to Rs.1,00,000 per month. In my batch, everyone gets a job as we are doctors. So, if I talk about doctors, there is almost a 100% guarantee of getting a job in the future.
content.Infrastructure: If I talk about infrastructure, it is good, not like other big colleges, but it is good for a government college. The lecture theatres are well maintained. They are highly modern and air-conditioned. There are air purifiers, and there are labs like biochemistry labs and all kinds of labs, whichever subject is required. Now, if I talk about hostels, they are average, with a mess, and the medical facilities are well. We are doctors, so we know medical practices. The hospital is open 24 hours for us. Hospital facilities are A1 but need some cleanliness inside the hostel and hospital.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Nursing - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: No permanent faculty is there in our college.

content.Placements: Placements are good in our college, but we need to study in a proper and efficient way. We have duty hours of 4 hours, which is now the training period. In this period, we are not getting any stipend and we are working a lot during the day and night, which needs to be changed.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is bad. The college campus is not so good. And also, the hostel campus is not so good. There is no boys hostel and in girls hostel, not sufficient place are there to stay, and also girls hostel infrastructure is not so good.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Glorious college, i.e. Veer Surendra Sai.

content.Placements: 80 to 90% students got placed from our college every year. The highest package is about 30 to 25 LPA. Good internship opportunities are available from our college. There are paid internships and unpaid too.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel and college fee is very affordable. All the faculty members are very talented and good at teaching. Wi-Fi is available all the time in hostel as well. The classrooms have very good condition. The faculty members are highly qualified. Food is provided in our college canteen.
content.Faculty: The teachers of our college are very helpful and dedicated towards their job. They are very friendly and they are highly qualified. Our course is highly relevant and very good for future demand. The exams are not so difficult and not even easy.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Overall a good college. Infrastructure can still improve though.

content.Placements: As a medical college, Vimsar provides education to it's best and many students get PG seats all over. Well paid. Facilities like books and easy contact to faculty members for PG preparation is there. PG seniors also help a lot. Tuitions are available. Lot of learning and better job opportunities.
content.Infrastructure: Almost all the facilities are present like gym, football ground, badminton court, canteen, Wi-Fi facility, library and many more. Mess is average. Sometimes below average. But canteen provides better food. Better grounds and gym are present. AC and WIFI in library is present.

reviews.review_heading: Glorious college, i.e. Veer Surendra Sai.
reviews.review_text: Hostel and college fee is very affordable. All the faculty members are very talented and good at teaching. Wi-Fi is available all the time in hostel as well. The classrooms have very good condition. The faculty members are highly qualified. Food is provided in our college canteen.

reviews.review_heading: Overall a good college. Infrastructure can still improve though.
reviews.review_text:
Almost all the facilities are present like gym, football ground, badminton court, canteen, Wi-Fi facility, library and many more. Mess is average. Sometimes below average. But canteen provides better food. Better grounds and gym are present.
AC and WIFI in library is present.

reviews.review_heading: Still, there are lot of thing to change.
reviews.review_text:
Almost everything is available, but maintenance is very poor. The library is available.
Food quality is moderate not so good not so bad. There is no sports facility here. If students want, they can join NCC. Skill labs, library, halls computer labs are available for study purposes.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best place to do MBBS.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is the best in class and you will never be short of facilities. We have a huge library with Wi-Fi and air conditioning. Wi-Fi speed is good but the library remains closed on Sunday. Hostels are better than an average government college.

reviews.review_heading: It's one of the top-ranked colleges in eastern India, with great infrastructure and academics.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a very good library, auditorium and lectures theatres. There are even basketball, football and volleyball courts and cricket is also encouraged here. Apart from the outdoors, there are indoor games too like badminton, table tennis, etc. Mess food differs hostel wise, but mostly, it serves North Indian and typical Odia cuisines.

reviews.review_heading: It is a prestigious institution and is worth it.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a newly constructed hostel with good infrastructure. There are well ventilated, spacious and well-lit rooms, and they are always equipped with facilities. The quality of the food served in the mess is average. Annual sports meet is organised for both boys and girls of PG and MBBS courses every year. The canteen is good.

reviews.review_heading: It is a government medical college, and all students get placements easily.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facility is available in both the hostel and college campus. Labs, classrooms and library are air-conditioned. The hostel provides single and two-bedded room, mess and canteen facilities are also provided with good quality food. There are cricket ground, football ground, volleyball court, basketball court, etc.

reviews.review_heading: It is a very good college with best facilities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. It has 2 buildings, 7 boys hostel, 4 girls hostel and hostels for postgraduate students. Every hostel has a separate mess and Wi-Fi. Classrooms are good with air-conditioners, and labs are provided for each department. Library facility has been very helpful for students with Wi-Fi access. There are also playgrounds for many games like cricket, football, basketball, volleyball, badminton, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it is one of the best medical colleges regarding academics.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is on developing mode. New LT, s are cool. No free Wi-Fi till now in hostel.24*7 library service yet to come. Hostel rooms are very spacious n well maintained. But the mess food quality is very pathetic. No gym and sports section. There is no club for extra curricular activities.

reviews.review_heading: Review of our medical college.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is okay types not upto the mark. Yet the medical facilities are at good level. For students it can be a great platform to learn but government should put some extra efforts and money on developing the infrastructure and maintenance of the college.

reviews.review_heading: Join Pleuripotent College for all round development and assured placement.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is quite lucrative. The new hostel is no less than a non-air-conditioned lodge. All the new lecture theatres are air-conditioned, well furnished and are well-equipped for tech guided teaching. We also have an in-hostel canteen. A volleyball court, basketball court, badminton court, and cricket ground are available on the campus. The college also has a central library.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with whatever I am getting from here.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are the best. Complex labs are there. Central library is present for 750 students. Wi-Fi is available in library. Basketball court, cricket ground and a gym is also there.

college_info.college_name: Mahatma Gandhi University, Meghalaya

highlights.summary:
Established in 2010 through Meghalaya State Legislative Act, Mahatma Gandhi University (MGU) is recognised by the University Grants Commission (UGC). The University has also gained recognition from Distance Education Bureau (DEB), Pharmacy Council of India (PCI), Bar Council of India (BCI) and is a member of Association of Indian Universities (AIU). It has received ‘Outstanding University in Training and Placement Award 2020’ in 16th World Education Summit-Hyderabad.

Mahatma Gandhi University Meghalaya comprises eight faculty, one centre and 21 departments offering courses at UG, PG, doctoral and diploma level in various streams like Science & Technology, Management & Commerce, Arts, Law & Education and Applied Technology, to name a few. It also offers distance education facility for Skill Development, IT, Management along with professional, lateral entry and traditional programmes.

The application forms for MGU Meghalaya 2020 are available online on the official website. Candidates also have the option of applying offline by obtaining the application form from the campus. Admission to various MGU courses is subject to the following conditions:

MGU Meghalaya provides a vast range of undergraduate, postgraduate and doctoral programmes to the students. UG programmes offered are of three-year duration, whereas the PG courses are of two-years. This University also offers diploma courses across 14 specialisations along with two doctoral-level courses i.e. MPhil and PhD.

The table below presents some of the popular MGU Meghalaya courses along with their eligibility criteria and fee structure:

This University features eight faculty consisting of 21 departments that offer UG, PG, diploma and doctoral-level courses across multiple streams. The table below presents different Mahatma Gandhi University Meghalaya faculty, along with their respective departments:

MGU Meghalaya has established a committed Training and Placement Cell at the campus that trains the students in cracking the interviews and securing befitting job opportunities. Some of the frequent recruiters who have hired students from this campus in the past include ICICI Bank, Government Medical College and Hospital and Ultratech Physiotherapy Clinic.

Note: The official website of University has no information regarding the placement success rate and salary packages offered to students in recent years.

Check out details on MGU Meghalaya Placements

MGU Meghalaya scholarships are majorly offered to girls and economically weak students pursuing courses at graduate as well as postgraduate level. Details are given below:

faqs.question: How do I get admission to Gautam Buddha University?
faqs.answer: Gautam Buddha University shortlists candidates for most of the courses based on GBU-ET. It is a university entrance exam conducted for admission to MBA, BTech, PhD, etc. National or state-level entrance exams such as GATE, CLAT, JEE Main, etc. are also accepted for a few courses. For courses such as BA, MA, MSc, MTech, etc., the admissions are based on merit in the last qualifying exam.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.A. (Hons.) in English - Batch of 2028
reviews_list.review_title: A decent college to have a good college life and a studious environment.

review_content.Placements: Since it's B.A. English course, we all know there are no placements for such a course. No companies come to hire students from the B.A. English course because it's obvious that it's a minor course. We don't wait for companies to come and give placements. If students want a placement, then they should join professional courses like B.Tech, B.Sc., etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: In terms of infrastructure, it is pretty great and better than other private colleges, while being a semi-government college. There is a LAN connection in a room for high-speed internet. The food is decent to eat, so it is easy to live and enjoy here.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com Hons.) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely dissatisfied because of no internship.

review_content.Placements: No placement is provided by the university, they just provide some sort of internships, and no permanent placements are provided to us. All the students need to do a job on their own, and the GBU team don't even provide a way to earn. Some of their internships are also free.
review_content.Infrastructure: All the hostels and course infrastructure are well maintained, no doubt. Hostels are well-maintained. Mess food is also good, not like other hostels, all the food given is good enough to eat. The infrastructure for courses is also well maintained. All the buildings and classes are covered with centralised AC.

review_summary.college_name: Gautam Buddha University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with my college experience and recommend Gautam Buddha University for higher studies.

content.Placements: In my course, B.Tech in computer science and engineering, placements are decent and above average. In my batch, around 40-50 percent of students have received a PPO till now from the college placement drive. The average package offered is 6 LPA, and the highest package offered is around 12 LPA. The top recruiting companies for our course are TCS, Wipro, HCL, and Tech Mahindra. 70 percent of students got internships during the internship scheme. Full-stack web developer, software developer, and software engineer are the top roles offered by companies.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: This is a semi-government college.

content.Placements: Around 75 to 80 percent of students are placed in our course. The highest package offered in this course is 7 to 8 LPA, and the minimum package is 3 to 4 LPA. Top recruiting companies in this course include HCL, Wipro, TCS, and Cognizant. Around 60 to 70 percent of students get internships from our course in companies like Wipro and others. The top roles offered in this course are Software Developer and App Developer.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of this college is average. Wi-Fi does not work properly. Lab chairs are not comfortable. The library is nice, but the classrooms are not perfect. Hostels have all facilities like AC, Wi-Fi, and medical facilities. In sports, they focus on volleyball, while indoor games are not available.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. (Hons.) in English - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: A decent college to have a good college life and a studious environment.

content.Placements: Since it's B.A. English course, we all know there are no placements for such a course. No companies come to hire students from the B.A. English course because it's obvious that it's a minor course. We don't wait for companies to come and give placements. If students want a placement, then they should join professional courses like B.Tech, B.Sc., etc.
content.Infrastructure: In terms of infrastructure, it is pretty great and better than other private colleges, while being a semi-government college. There is a LAN connection in a room for high-speed internet. The food is decent to eat, so it is easy to live and enjoy here.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com Hons.) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely dissatisfied because of no internship.

content.Placements: No placement is provided by the university, they just provide some sort of internships, and no permanent placements are provided to us. All the students need to do a job on their own, and the GBU team don't even provide a way to earn. Some of their internships are also free.
content.Infrastructure: All the hostels and course infrastructure are well maintained, no doubt. Hostels are well-maintained. Mess food is also good, not like other hostels, all the food given is good enough to eat. The infrastructure for courses is also well maintained. All the buildings and classes are covered with centralised AC.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Reality of Gautam Buddha university.

content.Placements: There is a GBU-ET exam that this university conducts for admission, and you can also take admission through JEE Main percentile. In GBU-ET, they ask 30 questions of each Mathematics, Physics, and Chemistry at a moderate level. Average package is approximately 4-5 LPA. There are some top recruiting companies like Wipro, etc. 30-40% students get on-campus jobs, others off-campus.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of college is very much nice. Classes are equipped with AC. There are separate rooms for each boy in hostel, which have a table, chair, and almari. There are water coolers in every hostel and building. There are also gym and sports building.

admission_overview.title: GBU Noida Admission Overview 2025
admission_overview.description: Gautam Buddha University admission is mainly entrance-based. The university conducts GBU-ET to shortlist candidates for various UG and PG courses. GBU also accepts direct admission to some of the programmes such as MTech, BCA, etc. It offers UG, PG, Doctoral and Diploma courses under various streams such as Engineering, Business Administration, Computer Applications, Biotechnology and Buddhist Studies. These courses are offered through eight schools of learning. Interested candidates can apply online for GBU admissions by following the admission process for Gautam Buddha University in the following article.

The university considers national-level tests, but preference is given to GBU-ET candidates. GBU-ET will be conducted at the various centres through computer-based tests. The date will be published in advance before the examination. Besides, candidates also need to fulfil the course-specific eligibility criteria for admission. The basic eligibility for UG courses is Class 12 whereas, graduation is required to apply for PG programmes. faqs.answer: The biggest transition for a student is to get promoted from high school to college. Students having huge stress for their new life chapters must learn the ways to prepare before stepping into it. There are various factors to help you in getting organized and build a strong foundation for your success. It range from searching academic support to developing strong interpersonal skills. There are some activities to do in your freshman year.College is more than continuing your education. Studying is important, but other activities are equally important to experience in this modern competitive world. You have four years of your graduation to engineering college, but there are some primary things that you can do as a freshman. It will help you to find the other opportunities during the rest of your college career. Along with the opportunities, the first year of the college provides the chance to face various challenges too. Here are some significant steps to get prepared for your freshman year.1. Get involved with Extra-curricular2. Research possible college major3. Read as much as possible in freshman year4. Create a study plan in freshman year5. Meet with your guidance counselor

paragraphs: GBU Noida Admission 2025: Eligibility & Selection Criteria

GBU admission to the UG and PG courses is based on merit or entrance exam scores. The university considers national-level tests, but preference is given toGBU-ETcandidates. GBU-ET will be conducted at the various centres throughcomputer-based tests. The date will be published in advance before the examination. Besides, candidates also need to fulfil the course-specific eligibility criteria for admission. The basic eligibility for UG courses is Class 12 whereas, graduation is required to apply for PG programmes. Below arepopular GBU coursesalong with their eligibility and selection criteria:
Graduation in any discipline with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for SC/ ST)

GBU feefor different programmes ranges between INR 20,000 and INR 10.8 lakh. The university provides 50% scholarships in tuition fees for students belonging to SC/ST categories. Also, GBU has the option to avail the relaxation of 50% of the fees for students securing more than 80% in Class 12 and admitted into BTech - Civil, Electrical and Mechanical Engineering. Find below the GBU tuition fees along with the average salary for some of the programmes:
Note: Candidates must note that this information is sourced from the official website of the institute/university sanctioning body and is subject to change

In any programme, the minimum number of students should be 15 or 50% of the total seat intake allocated to that programme. Students belonging to the Sport category can avail of the 5% relaxation in the respective qualifying examination. Seat reservation will be applicable as per the Government of U.P. and Gautam Buddha University. Find below the seat intake for popular programmes at GBU Noida:
Note: Candidates must note that this information is sourced from the official website of the institute/university sanctioning body and is subject to change

Gautam Buddha University admissions usually begin inApril. Generally, the GBU admission process includes steps including the registration process, merit list release, counselling, and admission fee payment. Candidates must start by applying for the course of their choice. Below are the steps to follow to get a seat in GBU Noida:
1. Application Process:

Candidates who wish to receive admission to GBU Noida must meet the course-specific eligibility criteria and pay the required application fee (INR 1,500 for General and INR 750 for SC/ ST candidates belonging to UP).
2. Selection:

Once the registration process is over, the university evaluates the applications of the candidates. The university selects candidates for most of the courses based on GBU-ET. It is a university entrance exam conducted for admission to MBA, BTech, PhD, etc. National or state-level entrance exams such asGATE, CLAT, JEE Main, etc. are also accepted for a few courses. For programmes such as BA, MA, MSc, MTech, etc., the admissions are based on merit in the last qualifying exam. The university releases the results ofGBU-ET online.
3. Admission Confirmation:

Selected candidates need to come for counselling and document verification. Aspirants need to bring the specified documents for verification. After the final selection is done, candidates need to pay a course fee to confirm their seats at the university.
For more information about Gautam Buddha University check out the below videos:

courses_data.name: GBU Noida BTech Admission 2025
eligibility: Accepting Exams:JEE Main, CBSE 12th, ISC, UP 12th
courses_data.description: Gautam Buddha University offers four-year BTech programme spread across eight semesters. Candidates who have passed Class 12 with Physics and Mathematics with at least 45% aggregate (40% aggregate for SC/ ST) can apply for GBU Noida BTech programme. The university also offers lateral entry to BTech course.

faqs.question: Is entrance exam accepted for BTech at Gautam Buddha University?
faqs.answer: Yes, Gautam Buddha University accepts JEE Main score for admission to BTech programme. The university also conducts GBU-ET for admission to BTech course. The exam is conducted in CBT mode. GBU-ET is conducted at designated centre. The date of exam and schedule is notified to candidates 15 days well in advance before the examination.

faqs.question: Who is eligible for BTech at Gautam Buddha University?
faqs.answer: Candidates need to pass Class 12 with Physics and Mathematics with at least 45% aggregate (40% aggregate for SC/ ST) to apply for Gautam Buddha University BTech programme. Candidates need to complete three years/ two years Diploma exam with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for reserved category) to apply for BTech (LE). Aspirants with BSc degree or DVoc can also apply.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for BTech in Gautam Buddha University?
faqs.answer: Gautam Buddha University provides BTech programs requiring students to have passed 10+2 with Physics & Mathematics as compulsory subjects, plus Chemistry, Biotechnology, technical vocational subject. Minimum of 45% marks & 40% for SC/ST is required in these subjects combined. Admission is based on Gautam Buddha University Entrance Test or JEE Main scores.

faqs.question: Is it compulsory to appear for the GBU entrance test?
faqs.answer: GBU admission in all UG, PG and doctoral courses is based on the GBU entrance test performance. However, candidates holding national-level test scores are also considered for admission, only if the seats remain vacant after GBU-ET.

courses_data.name: GBU Noida MBA Admission 2025
eligibility: Accepting Exams:MAT, XAT, CMAT, CAT, CUET-PG, CBSE 12th, ISC, JEE Main, UP 12th
courses_data.description: Gautam Buddha University offers two-year MBA programme divided into four semesters. The university offers MBA in Business Analytics & Data Science and General. Aspirants need to complete graduation in any discipline with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for SC/ ST) to apply for MBA course. The selection for MBA is based on GBU-ET score.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for MBA at Gautam Buddha University?
faqs.answer: Aspirants need to pass graduation in any discipline with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for SC/ ST) to apply for Gautam Buddha University MBA programme. Candidates must hold the documents proving their eligibility for verification at the time of admission.

faqs.question: Is MBA available at Gautam Buddha University?
faqs.answer: Gautam Buddha University offers two-year MBA programme spread across four semesters. The university offers MBA in Business Analytics & Data Science and General. Aspirants who have passed graduation in any discipline with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for SC/ ST) can apply for MBA course. Admission to MBA course is based on GBU-ET score.

courses_data.name: GBU Noida MA Admission 2025
courses_data.description: Gautam Buddha University offers two-year MA course spread across four semesters. The university offers MA inJournalism and Mass Communication, Human Rights, Sanskrit, Public Policy and Governance, etc. The minimum requirement to apply for MA programme is graduation. The university offers direct admission to candidates based on their merit in the last qualifying exam for MA.

faqs.question: How can I get admission to MA at Gautam Buddha University?
faqs.answer: Gautam Buddha University offers admission to MA based on merit in the last qualifying exam. Such candidates need to apply online for their course and wait for the selection confirmation. Once selected, candidates need to pay a course fee to confirm their seat in the university.

faqs.question: Does Gautam Buddha University offer MA?
faqs.answer: Gautam Buddha University offers two-year MA course divided into four semesters. The university offers MA in Journalism and Mass Communication, Sanskrit, Public Policy and Governance, etc. The minimum requirement to apply for MA programme is graduation. GBU offers direct admission to candidates based on their merit in the last qualifying exam for MA.

faqs.question: Can I join two programmes at Gautam Buddha University, GBU at a time?
faqs.answer: The curriculum of all its academic activities has an international and cross-cultural focus. At present, the school offers three programmes in management, which are Master in Business Administration (2-year full time), Dual Degree BBA + MBA (with existing option), B.Com (H)and Doctoral Programme.

faqs.question: Can foreign students also seek admission in GBU?
faqs.answer: Yes, the University has made its presence globally and is open for admission in all UG, PG and doctoral programmes for foreign students. Some of the countries from where the students have taken admission since GBU’s inception are: Vietnam, Cambodia, Afghanistan, South Korea, Thailand, USA, etc.

placement_data.title: Gautam Buddha University Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: Gautam Buddha University has released its placement brochure for 2025. As per the brochure, 75% of the engineering and management students secured placements during the Gautam Buddha University placements 2024. The highest package recorded during the placement season stood at INR 51 LPA. More than 100 companies like Wipro, Samsung, TCS, Adobe, HCL and many others were a part of the placement season.

Room, medical room/First aid box, visitor’s room, table tennis room, reading room, indoor games room, gymnasium, badminton court, volleyball court, basketball court etc.

Foreign nationals (married or unmarried) admitted students in various programs of the University are given priority for MRSH.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with my college experience and recommend Gautam Buddha University for higher studies.
reviews.review_text: It has a great and beautiful infrastructure, which is spread over 511 acres. It has facilities like a shopping complex and multiple cafes on campus. reviews.review_heading: This is a semi-government college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this college is average. Wi-Fi does not work properly. Lab chairs are not comfortable. The library is nice, but the classrooms are not perfect. Hostels have all facilities like AC, Wi-Fi, and medical facilities. In sports, they focus on volleyball, while indoor games are not available.

reviews.review_heading: A decent college to have a good college life and a studious environment.
reviews.review_text: In terms of infrastructure, it is pretty great and better than other private colleges, while being a semi-government college. There is a LAN connection in a room for high-speed internet. The food is decent to eat, so it is easy to live and enjoy here.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied because of no internship.
reviews.review_text: All the hostels and course infrastructure are well maintained, no doubt. Hostels are well-maintained. Mess food is also good, not like other hostels, all the food given is good enough to eat. The infrastructure for courses is also well maintained. All the buildings and classes are covered with centralised AC.

reviews.review_heading: Reality of Gautam Buddha university.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of college is very much nice. Classes are equipped with AC. There are separate rooms for each boy in hostel, which have a table, chair, and almari. There are water coolers in every hostel and building. There are also gym and sports building.

highlights.summary:
The NEET UG 2026 registration window is now closed for admission to the MBBS, BDS, and other courses. The exam is scheduled for May 3, 2026.

Here are some additional updates regarding the Jawaharlal Nehru Institute of Medical Sciences, Imphal:

faqs.answer: A:    The seats availability for offered courses at Jawaharlal Nehru Institute of Medical Sciences, Imphal goes up to 226. Courses offerred by Jawaharlal Nehru Institute of Medical Sciences, Imphal are approved by eminent Government bodies such as NMC.
faqs.question: What is the overall intake at Jawaharlal Nehru Institute of Medical Sciences, Imphal for all courses together?

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Satisfied with the infrastructure and facilities available. Would like improvements in the hostels.

review_content.Placements: Here we have a total class strength of 100 per batch in MBBS and 50 per batch in BDS. For a junior resident, the salary is 40k and for super specialties, itay reach 1.5 Lacs. Almost all the passed out students got internship from our college and get recruited either in government jobs like Medical officers or pursue PG in Management Quotas.
review_content.Infrastructure: We have seven lecture halls for theory classes. Practical halls for all the Pre and Para-Clinical subjects are available here. Library facilities are available. Hostels are not great but enough for us to survive. We have ample open space and fields to play any type s of games and sports. Mess is good.

reviews_list.batch_info: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Satisfied with academic qualities, but lagging a little on extra curriculum.

review_content.Placements: 100 students are placed, which is around 9% of all qualified students from our state, in the NEET UG exam. They provide a 4-year course with a 9-month internship. We are not recruited by companies, we have to give interviews and exams at different hospitals for a job. All those who pass all 4 years have a chance for an internship. The director of the state's health department oversees this process.
review_content.Infrastructure: Lecture halls, classrooms, laboratories, wards, ICU, and OPD are available where we get to learn and have experience dealing with patients in all these departments. However, the water supply is poor, and we need personal storage cans. We are not allowed to use electric heaters in winter, and there are no induction cookers or rice cookers. There is no place for recreation and no room for indoor sports like table tennis. The gate closes at 8, which is too early if we want to study in the college library. The security leaves soon after closing gate, so we have to make a call every time we are late. The hostel food does not provide evening snacks.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied for girls. Several students get good opportunities after taking admission.
reviews.review_text: infrastructure of our college is well established. But, the hostel has not been open for the past 4 years. There is a library, canteen, and PG canteen are available. The mess food is quite good and AIQs friendly. They generally cook traditional Manipur dishes like Iromba, Nari, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the infrastructure and facilities available. Would like improvements in the hostels.
reviews.review_text: We have seven lecture halls for theory classes. Practical halls for all the Pre and Para-Clinical subjects are available here. Library facilities are available. Hostels are not great but enough for us to survive. We have ample open space and fields to play any type s of games and sports. Mess is good.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with academic qualities, but lagging a little on extra curriculum.
reviews.review_text: Lecture halls, classrooms, laboratories, wards, ICU, and OPD are available where we get to learn and have experience dealing with patients in all these departments. However, the water supply is poor, and we need personal storage cans. We are not allowed to use electric heaters in winter, and there are no induction cookers or rice cookers. There is no place for recreation and no room for indoor sports like table tennis. The gate closes at 8, which is too early if we want to study in the college l...

reviews.review_heading: I remember my course while practicing surgery.
reviews.review_text: In our classroom, free Wi-Fi is available. Also, labs and the library are also good. Students enjoy it a lot. Facilities of the canteen, medical, sports and games are also available in our compound. We are very happy to stay at JNIMS without any difficulties.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor in Medical Laboratory Technology - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: Things that can help you decide if you should take admission to this college or not are mentioned.

review_content.Placements: More than 50% of students get placed here, but you have to do it on your own. College management will surely help you. Lal path Labs and many labs, whether they are in the health world or Mission Hospital, recruit BMLT professionals more often. Blood bank or pathology technologies are the positions.
review_content.Infrastructure: Hostels are well cleaned, and rooms are three- or four-bed, with an attached bathroom or common bathroom. The college lab and classrooms are Wi-Fi-enabled. College holds a sports day and other fests like the yearly fest,  etc. Our college has its own ambulance for medical emergencies.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor in Medical Laboratory Technology - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: Our college is very good.

review_content.Placements: Almost 80% of students got placed from our college in different private medical colleges and hospitals like Apollo Hospital, IQ City Medical College and Hospital, Gouri Devi Medical College, The Mission Hospital, Serum, Dr. Lal Path Labs, etc. The salary package offered is 1.8 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our classrooms is very good. The audio-visual system is available in every classroom for better understanding. Laboratories are well-developed. The library is very good, and all course-related books are available. Our college provides a separate hostel for boys and girls. Our college provides outdoor sports facilities.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor in Medical Laboratory Technology - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Best paramedical college in Durgapur.

content.Placements: Minimum 20% of students get placement. The highest package in 2023 is 8 crores. The total course fee is 2 lakhs and 67 thousand rupees. Per year, we paid 60 thousand rupees. Lab fee is 250 per semester and sports and library fee is 3000 per year. Very sincere and good professors.
content.Infrastructure: Faculty members are very good in teaching. All types of languages are available (Hindi, English, or Bengali). There are 2 labs with many machines and all machines are in good working condition. Wi-Fi is available 24/7. All facilities have MBBS graduates. The canteen is very good at cheap prices. Sports and games are done per year at the end of the year.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor in Medical Laboratory Technology - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: All about Paramedical College, Durgapur.

content.Placements: Paramedical College, Durgapur, is a well-known paramedical institute in West Bengal. If talking about placement the college sometimes provide it and sometimes not. I am pursuing a B.Sc. in MLT, which is a course based on laboratory technology. Most seniors get placed on their own skills; a few get placed by campusing. Those companies are Redcliff Labs, Lal Path Labs, and Healthword Hospital.
content.Infrastructure: If it comes to infrastructure, that is good enough. There is Wi-Fi available 24/7 in classrooms. And labs are available on every subject, like our Biochemistry Lab, Pathology Lab, and Microbiology Lab. Girls hostels are a heaven-like place in our college; cleanliness is everywhere, but you have to pay a hefty amount—seven thousand to eight thousand per month. The canteen, or you can say mess, provides three meals a day.

reviews.review_heading: Best paramedical college in Durgapur.
reviews.review_text: Faculty members are very good in teaching. All types of languages are available (Hindi, English, or Bengali). Sports and games are done per year at the end of the year.

reviews.review_heading: All about Paramedical College, Durgapur.
reviews.review_text: If it comes to infrastructure, that is good enough. There is Wi-Fi available 24/7 in classrooms. And labs are available on every subject, like our Biochemistry Lab, Pathology Lab, and Microbiology Lab. Girls hostels are a heaven-like place in our college; cleanliness is everywhere, but you have to pay a hefty amount—seven thousand to eight thousand per month. The canteen, or you can say mess, provides three meals a day.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best paramedical college in West Bengal.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are good in this college. It provides an aqua guard, clean washrooms, and laboratories. All kinds of medical kits and machines are available. The library is fully modified and several books are available. The food quality is average. The canteen is also clean. Medical facilities are provided. The sports ground is also available on premises.

reviews.review_heading: College is very good for degrees for a good job.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is always available in this college and it is for all the students and teachers. Labs are clean and well maintained. Also, the classrooms are always cleaned. Library has all the books you may require for knowledge. Everything is available in this college every year.

reviews.review_heading: This is a very good college for paramedical students.
reviews.review_text: The Wi-Fi, labs and the material are up to date. Classrooms are very good as you can feel the study vibe in them. Library has good collection of books. In January, our college organizes sports activities. Our warden is good. We do not feel that we are far from home, she never makes us feel other than that.

reviews.review_heading: I'm absolutely satisfied with the college.
reviews.review_text: Our college offers free Laboratory, Library and its classrooms are very good. Our college offers free Wi-Fi. Boy's hostel is good. There is a senior assistant who takes care of our, that is why our hostel and also our college is ragging free. Girls' hostel is the same. There are 2 separate hostels for girls. They both are ragging free.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Paramedical College, Durgapur.
reviews.review_text: Our infrastructure is good and facilities are very cooperative. Classrooms have projector facilities, labs are fully equipped and library has digital software facilities. Some of our faculty members were very helpful and cooperative. They treated us like our elder brothers, but the food quality was below average. Sports and games were available for all, mainly outdoor games.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best paramedical college in west Bengal.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is free in our college but does not connect to the phone. We have a full air-conditioned classroom with a projector and speaker. The library is good. The hostel is good and good food is provided in the hostel. All time canteen is open and all types of food are available. All types of games are played in our college.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely dissatisfied with faculty and good placements.
reviews.review_text: College provides free Wi-Fi but is not connected. Labs are clean and have a microscope, autoclave, centrifuge, Microtome, and incubator in average conditions. Classrooms are clean with a projector and air-conditioners. Library has a lot of books, so no need to buy any books from outside. The quality of food is average. A playground is available.

reviews.review_heading: Our college gives good experience.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is not available in the hostel. Labs and classrooms are well maintained with cleanliness. Hostels for girls and boys are inside the college campus. There is a canteen to have food. College canteen provides breakfast, lunch, and dinner for hostelers.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Paramedical College, Durgapur by a student of the same college.
reviews.review_text: There has labs, libraries and classrooms. You can study with a projector in the classroom. You can practice your study skill in labs And You can study your syllabus or other books in the library. There is no wi-fi connection for students. The hostel is good but their food is bad.

reviews.review_heading: Review of our Paramedical College, Durgapur.
reviews.review_text: In our college, all platforms like classrooms and various department labs are pretty good and spacious. All are in comfort. Labs are well-equipped with instrument and properly sanitized. Wi-Fi facility is available but students need a password to use which can be provided by teachers. The medical and sports facilities are pretty good. The canteen system is also good.

highlights.summary: The NEET UG 2026 registration window is now closed for admission to the MBBS, BDS, and other courses. The exam is scheduled for May 3, 2026.

faqs.answer: A:    The  Dental College RIMS NEET cutoff 2025 was released for admission to the BDS course for various rounds and categories under the All India quota.For the General AI category, the overall cutoff varied between 20798 and 60334. Hence, students who belong to this category need to secure at least a rank of 60334 to have a chance at admisson. Read more: Dental College RIMS, Imphal cutoff
faqs.question: What is the Dental College RIMS NEET cutoff?

faqs.answer: A:    A significant number of applicants compete for a limited number of seats in government medical colleges under the All India quota based on NEET exam, making admission extremely competitive.For General AI category, the cutoffs are substantially higher than the cutoff for other All India quota seats. A considerably higher score—often in the range of 650–700 or more out of 720—is typically needed to be eligible for a place in a government medical college through the All India quota.A candidate who scores only 2–4 marks above the cutoff is likely to enter a highly competitive zone where their prospects of getting an All India quota seat are unpredictable and dependent on a number of variables, including the distribution of their overall score and the number of seats available.The number of candidates taking the NEET exam has a direct effect on the cut-off as well. A big candidate pool raises the level of competition and could result in higher cutoffs. The cut-off scores are impacted by the number of seats available in medical colleges.
