Dental College RIMS, Imphal NEET UG cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final seat allotment result for admission to the BDS course. The cutoff was released for several categories belonging to the AI quota. For the General AI quota, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 60334 for BDS admission. Candidates can refer to the table below to view the first and last round cutoffs 2025 for the General AI category students.

Dental College RIMS, Imphal BDS cutoff 2025 was 60334 for the students belonging to the General AI quota. Similarly, for the OBC category students, the NEET UG last round closing rank was 62984 for admission to the BDS course. Comparing both categories, the cutoff rank was more competitive for the General category students as compared to the OBC category for BDS admission. For other categories and rounds, use the provided filters.

Dental College RIMS, Imphal accepts the NEET UG entrance exam for selecting students to the BDS course. Candidates with a valid score are then eligible for the NEET UG counselling. For 2026 admission, aspirants must refer to the table below to view some of the important NEET UG 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

review_content.Placements: Okay, so to be honest, everyone will get placements after the fourth year. The starting salary you can expect from this course is LPA. review_content.Infrastructure: I'll say that the infrastructure is poor. Our department only has 3 classrooms and to take the rest of the medical, classes we have to go to other colleges within the university. reviews_list.review_title: There is good infrastructure in the university.

review_content.Placements: A lot of students are aware of the placement team. In the university, an average package of 3- 5 LPA is given, and the minimum package is 1 LPA. Those companies who want village advisers come to our university and take the student for a job in his company.
review_content.Infrastructure: The style of building is unique with large and linear structures dotted around 51 acres of land. The campus has a large courtyard. reviews_list.review_title: Our college is very good.

review_content.Placements: Around 50% of students are placed. The highest salary package is 80 LPA, the lowest salary package is 30 LPA, and the average salary package is 50 LPA. There are many companies for B.Sc. Nursing. Around 100% of students get internships. There are many types of roles.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and the library are very good. The quality of food in the mess and canteen, medical facilities, sports, and games are available.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers are qualified and educated. University makes teachers the best for the job. Semester exams are not so difficult and we need minimum pass percentage marks of 50%. If we keep it regulatory then our passing will not be so difficult. Papers are not so difficult.

faqs.answer: No, compared to private or deemed universities, enrolling in undergraduate (UG) programs at Maharaj Vinayak Global University (MVGU) is typically not very expensive. Here are some details about the expenses:1. Because MVGU is a state-owned private university, its undergraduate programme tuition rates are set and fair. For the duration of the course, the fees would range from Rs 50,000 to Rs 3 Lakhs.2. For worthy and less fortunate students, MVGU offers generous scholarships and financial aid programs like fee waivers, concessions, installment plans, etc.3. In comparison to many private colleges, the costs are fairly reasonable. Furthermore, the cost is significantly lower than enrolling in the same undergraduate programs at private or deemed universities.4. Meals and hostel fees are also extremely low and heavily subsidized for MVGU students. The annual cost of shared housing is less than Rs 1 lakh. 5. Since MVGU owns its own campus and facilities, students do not have to pay outside expenses for things like rent, utilities, or commuting.In conclusion, MVGU offers reasonably priced, high-quality UG education, as well as reasonable career and post-graduation study opportunities. A three-year undergraduate programme can be funded for a total of Rs 2–5 lakhs, which is a good deal of money.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Nursing - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Overall, it's a good college, but there's no chance of placement.

content.Placements: There are no placements given by the college campus. I mean, students who are studying here have no chance of placement through the college or university. This means students should study hard to secure placements, whether in the government or private sector.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are fine, but labs need a little enhancement. I mean, classrooms are full of water coolers and six windows in classroom for proper ventilation, and on each window, there are curtains which block the sun rays and light during summer.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Physiotherapy (BPT) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: The college has great faculty and good placements.

content.Placements: They provide great placements after graduation. They provide internships to every student from their favorite hospital, not only from Jaipur but from other states too. They also organize workshops on various topics within campus only. Students who graduated from this college got a decent amount of salary.
content.Infrastructure: They have AC classrooms, Wi-Fi, great labs of anatomy physiology, and biochemistry, and a huge library. You can find almost every medical book in the library. The library is also very well-furnished and clean. The hostel is also very safe, especially for girls. The mess also provides good food.

admission_overview.college_name: MVGU Admission 2025: Eligibility, Fee, Application & Selection Criteria

paragraphs: MVGU admissionsare primarily merit-based. However, the university also conducts entrance exam for some of the courses such as LLM, LLB, etc.Maharaj Vinayak Global Universityoffers courses at UG, PG and doctoral levels in multiple streams such as Nursing, Arts, Science, Commerce, etc. through various colleges and schools under it. Interested candidates can apply forMVGU Jaipur admissionon the official website of the university.

Maharaj Vinayak Global University admissions are conducted online. Candidates are first required to register for the course of their choice followed by participating in the selection rounds. Below are key MVGU admission highlights:
Particulars
MVGU Admission Highlights 2025
Mode of study
Programmes Offered
Admission status 2025
Ongoing:UG, PG & Doctoral
Fee range across courses
UG courses:INR 15,000 - INR 13.8 lakh
PG courses:INR 16,000 - INR 25.5 lakh
How to apply?
https://mvgu.ac.in/
Level of programmes offered
Popular programmes

MVGU Jaipur offers seats to candidates based on merit in the last qualifying exam or entrance exam. Candidates also need to fulfil the eligibility criteria set by the university for admission. The basic eligibility for UG courses is Class 12 whereas, graduation is required to apply for PG programmes. Find below eligibility and selection criteria for topMVGU courses:
Class 12 with Science (PCB) and English Core/ Elective with at least 45% aggregate (40% aggregate for SC/ ST)
The minimum age for admission shall be 17 years on Dec 31 in which admission is sought
Class 12 withPhysics, Chemistry,Biologyand English with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for SC/ ST/ OBC)
He/ She shall have completed the age of 17 years on Dec 31 in the year of admission

MVGU fee is a sum of multiple components such as tuition fee, caution deposit, etc. Candidates need to pay fee at the time of admission to confirm their seat in the university. Coming toaffordability, it is one of the reasons why many leave a degree or a college. While theavailability of education loans and scholarshipshas made education accessible but the terms and conditions required to become eligible for a student loan or a scholarship often stand as a challenge. Below areMVGU feesand intake for top courses:
Note:This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

MVGU Jaipur admission process includes multiple steps. Candidates wishing to get admission in the university must begin by applying for the preferred course. The criteria for selection will vary as per the course selected by the candidates. Below is the step-wise MVGU admission process:
STEP 1: MVGU Application Process 2025

Candidates can apply for their preferred course online on the official website of the university. Aspirants must meet the eligibility criteria set for their course to avoid rejection. Candidates can also download the application form or collect it from the admission office of the campus.
STEP 2: Selection

Once the registration is over, the university selects candidates for BDS and MDS based on NEET UG and NEET MDS scores. For courses such as LLB, LLM, etc., the university conducts an entrance exam for admission. The selection for all other programmes is based on merit in the last qualifying exam.
STEP 3: Admission Confirmation

After the selection process is over, selected candidates are required to come for document verification. For courses in which admission is entrance-based, the exam results will be evaluated for final selection. Shortlisted aspirants are required to pay course fee to confirm their seat in the university.

The BSc Biotechnology programme is of three-year duration while BSc Nursing is a four-year programme. The minimum age required to apply for admission is 17 years. Given below is the minimum eligibility criteria and annual seat intake for the same: BSc Specialisation Seat Intake Eligibility Criteria Nursing 60 Passed Class 12 from a recognised board with a minimum of 50% aggregate (45% for SC/ ST/ OBC candidates) Biotechnology N/A MVGU also offers a two-year BSc Post-Basic Nursing programme, comprising four semesters. The admission process for the eligible candidates is conducted as per the guidelines prescribed in the Rajasthan Private Universities Act. As per the act, the eligible candidates with a high aggregate score in Class 12 are offered admission as per the seat availability. The selection for BPT is based on merit of the aspirants in the qualifying exam. Aspirants must hold the documents proving their eligibility for verification at the time of admission.

faqs.question: How many rounds are there in Maharaj Vinayak Global University - MVGU admission counseling?

faqs.question: Can students join Maharaj Vinayak Global University - MVGU directly without any entrance exam?

data: Government Job Profiles for BA Graduates

faqs.question: Are there any government jobs that I can apply for after B.A from MVGU?
faqs.answer: Yes, there are various job options in the government sector for BA degree holders. The MVGU BA graduates can go to the government websites to apply for these job profiles. Candidates selection shall depend upon the selection procedure for the job role as per the respective department. Some of the popular government job profiles that BA graduates can apply for along with the average salary package are mentioned below: Government Job Profiles for BA Graduates Average Salary IAS INR 30 lakh IPS INR 27 lakh IFS INR 27 lakh Bank officer INR 18 lakh Research Associate INR 4.6 lakh Civil Defense Services INR 14 lakh Indian Airforce INR 8.5 lakh NOTE: The mentioned salary packages are as per data curated from multiple sources. Hence, is indicative.

faqs.question: What is the highest package for MBA students at MVGU?
faqs.answer: Around 50% of students are placed. The highest salary package is 80 LPA, the lowest salary package is INR 30 LPA, and the average salary package is INR 50 LPA. There are many companies for B.Sc. Nursing. Around 100% of students get internships.

faqs.question: What are the career prospects after B.Com from MVGU?
faqs.answer: There are a plethora of opportunities for BCom graduates in the field of Accounting , Taxation, Finance, Economics , Insurance, and more. MVGU BCom degree holders can build a career as an Accountant, Financial Analyst, Auditor, etc. To boost the career graph, the graduates can also pursue MBA degree. Moreover, the jobs are available in both public and private sectors. Candidates can start to read more on career after BCom to understand the options available and popular recruiters.

faqs.question: What are the career prospects after completing Diploma in Pharmacy from MVGU Jaipur?
faqs.answer: The Diploma holders can find options in both government and private sector. These students can also pursue BPharm by taking lateral entry in the course to boost their career graph. MVGU Dpharm passouts can find jobs in community health centres, NGOs, and pharmaceutical companies. Some of the job prospects for DPharm holders are: Drug Therapist Medical Sales Representative Hospital Operations Manager Pharmacist Pharmaceutical Manufacturing Executive, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it's a good college, but there's no chance of placement.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are fine, but labs need a little enhancement. I mean, classrooms are full of water coolers and six windows in classroom for proper ventilation, and on each window, there are curtains which block the sun rays and light during summer.

reviews.review_heading: The college has great faculty and good placements.
reviews.review_text: They have AC classrooms, Wi-Fi, great labs of anatomy physiology, and biochemistry, and a huge library. You can find almost every medical book in the library. The library is also very well-furnished and clean. The hostel is also very safe, especially for girls. The mess also provides good food.

reviews.review_heading: Want to become an occupational therapist?
reviews.review_text: I'll say that the infrastructure is poor. Our department only has 3 classrooms and to take the rest of the medical, classes we have to go to other colleges within the university. There's one big common library for every student pursuing any kind of course at the university. Wi-Fi and AC are also there. There is no Wi-Fi which works in most of the places inside the university campuses.

reviews.review_heading: There is good infrastructure in the university.
reviews.review_text: The style of building is unique with large and linear structures dotted around 51 acres of land. The campus has a large courtyard. It has been designed by keeping in mind the climatic condition, connecting the past with modern and contemporary design. The concept of MVGU building and landscape create an environment with liveliness.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is very good.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and the library are very good. The quality of food in the mess and canteen, medical facilities, sports, and games are available.

reviews.review_heading: MVGU is one of the best universities for students to study.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is awesome. The university has a very large green campus with world-class infrastructure. The hostel is available for both boys and girls. There is 24x7 tight security. Our college also provides facilities like Wi-Fi,  air-conditioned classrooms, labs, a huge auditorium, and ATM facility. There is a well-stocked library with all the books of all courses. Top facilities available for students to study.

Very good professional Faculty members Well settled building Nive environment management is well behave Canteen facility is too good veg and non-veg both Labs have all the things like dummies all accessories I always recommend this University because it is one of University who provide Phd courses in medical. reviews.review_heading: Our college is the best college to pursue and it would be worth two years.
reviews.review_text: Libraries, sports, study rooms, and classrooms were provided. Wi-Fi facilities and technical support were provided. Hygienic canteen facilities and food services were provided. The campus and departments were kept clean and tidy. The temperature of students and faculty members is checked daily at the entrance of the college for precautions.

reviews.review_heading: The main problem is that there are no placements for students.
reviews.review_text: I would like to say that the department is good. All laboratories are present in the college with proper supplies and equipment. In the hostel, rooms are good with good quality food, milk, and water.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2029
individual_reviews.title: It's a very good college, but it has strict rules.

content.Placements: It is a professional medical degree college, in our batch, there are 200 students. The college management is providing us with five cadavers, and our college has disciplined rules and has anti-ragging communities and anti-drugs communities where some of the people are selected. It is a very good college to improve knowledge, and 80% to 90% students get their internships.
content.Infrastructure: Our college management provides good facilities and infrastructure. We have a projector and AC in the classroom. The library also has the AC and all types of books by different authors. Labs have good equipment, and the food is also very good. Medical facilities are also good, providing wheelchairs for the hostels for emergency situations. We can play sports and games. Our management conducts some programs to improve the spirit of students.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Good faculty members with more knowledge and more greenery college.

content.Placements: There will be no placements or placement offers at this college. But they will provide an internship for a year with stipend to students by attending clinical postings during that year. That stipend is based on their wish as this is a private medical college.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities that college provides are good. The infrastructure structure is very good as students will be exposed to the clinical subjects in their 2nd year, only with theoretical and clinical knowledge, and a skills lab. Hostel and canteen are also fine. Ground is provided for those students who show interest in games.

The food is not good but sometimes it is good and snacks are somewhat good. On Sunday, we can eat many times and canteen also present different types of food items.

individual_reviews.course: MBBS - Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Review of My College Life

content.Placements: Presently, nearly 200 students are placed in our college. The placements are based on the NEET PG entrance exam, which is conducted after the completion of the course. We must pass the exam and gain admission into a PG college, after which we receive a stipend and can work in hospitals.
content.Infrastructure: The faculty is very nice, highly qualified, and educated. The college has a library that provides various medical books, which helps us read without having to buy them. This is especially helpful for those who can't afford books. The mess in the hostel is good, and there is a canteen for those who want to eat. Sports and games are conducted every year.

hostel_campus.college_name: Maharajah's Institute of Medical Sciences Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: It's a very good college, but it has strict rules.
reviews.review_text: Our college management provides good facilities and infrastructure. We have a projector and AC in the classroom. The library also has the AC and all types of books by different authors. Labs have good equipment, and the food is also very good. Medical facilities are also good, providing wheelchairs for the hostels for emergency situations. We can play sports and games. Our management conducts some programs to improve the spirit of students.

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty members with more knowledge and more greenery college.
reviews.review_text: The facilities that college provides are good. The infrastructure structure is very good as students will be exposed to the clinical subjects in their 2nd year, only with theoretical and clinical knowledge, and a skills lab. Hostel and canteen are also fine. Ground is provided for those students who show interest in games.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The department has good facilities including high-speed Wi-Fi, well-maintained labs, smart classrooms, and a decent library. The hostel infrastructure is decent too, with clean rooms and regular maintenance. Food in the mess is hygienic, though not very diverse in taste. Medical facilities and sports grounds are available and regularly used by students. The campus is clean and has good greenery.

reviews.review_heading: Best college in my opinion because we can learn.
reviews.review_text: In our hostels, there are many facilities like labs, studyroom, Wi-Fi, and library. AC rooms are also available in our hostel. The food is not good but sometimes it is good and snacks are somewhat good. On Sunday, we can eat many times and canteen also present different types of food items.

reviews.review_heading: Review of My College Life
reviews.review_text: The faculty is very nice, highly qualified, and educated. The college has a library that provides various medical books, which helps us read without having to buy them. This is especially helpful for those who can't afford books. The mess in the hostel is good, and there is a canteen for those who want to eat. Sports and games are conducted every year.

reviews.review_heading: It is a very good college for studies.
reviews.review_text: This institution is 25 years old. The infrastructure is also old, but they are providing new machinery every year. Laboratories and classrooms are well-equipped with projectors and sound systems. Our institution has a central library along with many department-wise libraries and museums. The hostel facility is average. Three students are occupied by a single non-air-conditioner room with an attached washroom. The quality of food is not good. Students are allowed to play various indoor and outdoo...

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college because of teachers, good placements, infrastructure, and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a lot of equipment. Recently, our college has remodeled our classrooms, lecture galleries, and hostel facilities. MRI and CT scans are also available with advanced modalities. It provides intra university sports meet every year, and also has a good library with all kinds of books.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college because of faculty members, good placements, and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a lot of equipment. Recently our college has remodeled our classrooms, lecture galleries, and hostel facilities. MRI and CT scans are also available in our college with advanced facilities. Our college conducts intra-university sports meet every year. There are the best microscopes in our labs. Our library is the best, and we have 24 hours access to our library.

reviews.review_heading: Our college students got good placements in AIMS and JIPMER.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides spacious and air-conditioned classrooms with good furniture to sit comfortably in class. It provides a library 24x7 with an air-conditioned facility. The hostel rooms are neat and clean. Daily a worker will be available for cleaning of rooms. The food served in the hostel is so homely.

reviews.review_heading: This college is good, and I would recommend students to take admission in it.
reviews.review_text: It provides 24X7 air-conditioned in the library. It has spacious lecture galleries for classes that were air-conditioned. The hostel rooms were clean, daily tier will be a worker for cleaning rooms. The hostel food was homely, and the infrastructure of this college was excellent.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good private medical college.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure are available. Wi-Fi is available for staff only and for office purposes only. We have a central library in the college. Labs are available in each department. Classrooms are centrally air-conditioned. Facilities like mess and canteen, medical, sports and games are also available.

reviews.review_heading: I would recommend students to join this college and complete the MBBS.
reviews.review_text: The facilities contain a library with an air-conditioner, laboratories containing enough equipment, and lecturers and laboratory personnel. The classrooms are also air-conditioned and have enough lighting. Mess and canteen contain with average food without hygiene. Sports activities are provided like cricket ground, basketball, and volleyball courts.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it is a good college, but you don't expect much from the clinical field.
reviews.review_text: There is no Wi-Fi here, but the labs are good. Classrooms are very good, and the quality of food served in the mess is low. Medical facilities are good, and there are no indoor courts. In the 1st year, dissection halls and labs are well-equipped, while in the 2nd year, labs are very good. Classrooms have central air-conditioning, and all books are available in the library.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college, but there is stress because of the rules of the college.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides facilities like air-conditioned classrooms and a library. The hostel is non-air-conditioned. The college has good microscopes. The food served in the hostel is average, and the food served in the canteen is good. Medical facilities are available for 24 hours. For sports, it does not have a well-equipped ground, but we play games on that ground only.

reviews.review_heading: Interesting things of my college.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available, labs are well-equipped, classrooms have central air conditioning. Hostel facility is also good and sports are there with a very big ground but the physical trainer is not that good. A physiotherapy clinic is also present. Food is okay in the canteen.

reviews_list.review_title: College is good in terms of education, but since its a temporary campus, there is scarcity.

review_content.Placements: MBBS is a total of 5.5 years, including a 1-year internship. NEET UG is the entrance to get into the course; it comprises 19 subjects in three phases: pre-clinical, para clinical and clinical. MBBS demands a lot of interest and hard work since its a matter of saving lives. So whoever is thinking of opting for medicine should be headstrong and invest time in studying more and more.
review_content.Infrastructure: Medical colleges have their own hospitals. They are well-equipped with smart classrooms, practical labs, and a library. The campus is generally crowded and large due to the hospital. Regarding hostels, generally they are shared between 2–3 people; other facilities are also provided, like gyms and sports facilities.

individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied with the faculty. The campus is a bit undone but the rest is manageable.

content.Placements: As we come from a reputed institution, placement and job security are high. We are trained well in skills and clinical practices, and we are highly skilled in diagnostics. The roles offered after my course are multiple; for example, we can work in the government sector or even pursue a NEET-PG for an MS or MD degree .
content.Infrastructure: The campus is a bit small but there is construction in progress for the new campus, which is way closer to the city. individual_reviews.title: Good and Bands of Kle Jgmm.

content.Placements: Almost 90% of students get jobs after passing out of this college. An average salary of 50,000 is a benefit. Government jobs are available, and there is also a large scope of private opportunities, which provide comparatively more than government jobs. The top roles are those of medical offices and doctors in government hospitals.
content.Infrastructure: College lecture halls are good and digitalized. The library is good, and all types of academically required books are available. The digital library provides a good opportunity to gain information from online sources. Hostels are good and provide all the basic requirements. Wi-Fi and housekeeping are provided in the same style. Mess food is good. Medical facilities are good, and all the primary health services are available. Sports and games are conducted according to.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: College is good in terms of education, but since its a temporary campus, there is scarcity.

content.Placements: MBBS is a total of 5.5 years, including a 1-year internship. NEET UG is the entrance to get into the course; it comprises 19 subjects in three phases: pre-clinical, para clinical and clinical. MBBS demands a lot of interest and hard work since its a matter of saving lives. So whoever is thinking of opting for medicine should be headstrong and invest time in studying more and more.
content.Infrastructure: Medical colleges have their own hospitals. They are well-equipped with smart classrooms, practical labs, and a library. The campus is generally crowded and large due to the hospital. Regarding hostels, generally they are shared between 2–3 people; other facilities are also provided, like gyms and sports facilities.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Medicine and Bachelor of Surgery (MBBS) - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Review of Jagadguru Gangadhar Mahaswamigalu Moorsavirmath Medical College.

content.Placements: Since the college was opened in 2021, the first batch is still in its second year. The MBBS is a 5.5-year course. Our college does not provide placements. The college is a subunit of KLE.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is not available. The mess is good. There is a laundry service, a juice center, and a fast food center on campus. There is a library, which is open from Monday to Saturday. There is a demo room in each department. There are practical halls, a dissection hall, and two lecture halls.
content.Faculty: Our teachers are good. Exams are conducted almost every week. Our teachers have many years of experience. Small group discussions, webinars, and presentations are conducted daily.

review_content.Placements: I study at GMC, Churu, which was started in the year 2018. Our batch is the second batch of the college. There is no such kind of thing as company placement in medical colleges. But despite being a new college the results of every batch of my colleagues are genuinely good.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college building is still under construction, the sports facilities are very poor. There is lots of weed inside the campus, and the hostel rooms are good but there is a shortage of water. Mess's food is pathetic, there is not any kind of sports ground.

reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with its teachers, but extremely not satisfied with infrastructure and development.

review_content.Placements: In this college, students get placed as junior residents, as students will be a doctor so they can join any government and private hospital because already there is much scarcity of doctors in a country like India. review_content.Infrastructure: This college building is yet not complete, the duct system has not been installed, Wi-Fi of the library does not work well. There is no proper lighting, even there are only 2 lecture theaters but currently, students have 4 batches in our college. The camps are not good, and no plants at all. The food served is average, and the hostel is good, but sometimes no maid for cleaning.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: The highest package offered is 12 lakh per annum. The teaching quality is very good.

review_content.Placements: We have a good placement record. There are a good number of companies visiting the campus for placement drives. About 30-45% of the students placed in campus drives. The highest package is up to 12 lac per annum. The staff helps the students to get placed in reputed companies.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is good as all the labs are well maintained by th college authorities and classes are also well maintained & also large land provided for sports area. The computer lab is available for students. The college has a good infrastructure and college campus.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2017
reviews_list.review_title: The college is NAAC grade A accredited and it is a really good place to study.

review_content.Placements: The placement scenario is not good in KJ. Our placement cell did give some on-campus and off-campus calls. The off-campus companies never called back any of the participated students. There is one good thing in KJ that is the skill development programme carried out in our college in association with Zensar Technologies. From my batch hardly 1% students got placed. It is same in case of the previous batch.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college infrastructure structure is really good. We have all the required facilities like Wi-Fi, computer labs with required software, library, sports equipment and grounds. There are three canteens available on the campus. The food quality is also nice. There are also 2-3 snacks centres and xerox centres in the campus. There is a boys hostel on our campus which is also very good with all the facilities like Wi-Fi, drinking water, hot water and all. The mess facility is also nice. Hostel rooms are clean and spacious with 3 beds in a room. There is attached bathroom in all rooms.

The scope of the BTech CSE programme in India is excellent and hence the starting salary packages offered by recruiters are also high as compared to some other engineering courses.The salary depends on factors like the years of experience you hold, your academic qualification, skill set, etc. Once you enter the industry and get some years of experience in hand, you will get a higher salary package. But, in the starting of your career journey, you can expect between INR 4 LPA and INR 6 LPA.

review_summary.college_name: KJ's Educational Institute Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: It is one of the best colleges in Pune for completing the degree.

content.Placements: I am from a computer engineering course. About 85% of the students got placed in various companies. The average salary package offered in this college is 3.7 LPA. Top recruiting companies are TCS, Wipro, Zensar, Tech Mahindra, Syntel, Infosys, CDAC, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel is very beautiful, and the surrounding is also very beautiful. For studies, it is very good. The environment near the college campus is very good, so it is one of my favourite colleges. Classrooms are very comfortable, and every class is full of light.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with the faculty, placements and infrastructure.

content.Placements: Our college is very much helpful for conducting training and placements. Many companies visit our college for placements every year. Many good students are currently working with a good package. Many students get placed at the college.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is great. Our college is situated in a very nice place. The hostel facility is available for students, and it is quite well-maintained. Wi-Fi facility is available on the campus. There is a great library with all the required books. Our college provides canteens and playground for sports and games.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: The highest package offered is 12 lakh per annum. The teaching quality is very good.

content.Placements: We have a good placement record. There are a good number of companies visiting the campus for placement drives. About 30-45% of the students placed in campus drives. The highest package is up to 12 lac per annum. The staff helps the students to get placed in reputed companies.
content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is good as all the labs are well maintained by th college authorities and classes are also well maintained & also large land provided for sports area. The computer lab is available for students. The college has a good infrastructure and college campus.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: The college is NAAC grade A accredited and it is a really good place to study.

content.Placements: The placement scenario is not good in KJ. Our placement cell did give some on-campus and off-campus calls. The off-campus companies never called back any of the participated students. There is one good thing in KJ that is the skill development programme carried out in our college in association with Zensar Technologies. From my batch hardly 1% students got placed. It is same in case of the previous batch.
content.Infrastructure: Our college infrastructure structure is really good. We have all the required facilities like Wi-Fi, computer labs with required software, library, sports equipment and grounds. There are three canteens available on the campus. The food quality is also nice. There are also 2-3 snacks centres and xerox centres in the campus. There is a boys hostel on our campus which is also very good with all the facilities like Wi-Fi, drinking water, hot water and all. The mess facility is also nice. Hostel rooms are clean and spacious with 3 beds in a room. There is attached bathroom in all rooms.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electrical Engineering - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: The college doesn't match the fee level. Facilities provided by the college are very poor.

content.Placements: The college arranges placement programs. Hardly 2-3 companies come to recruit students. The selection criteria for recruitment may be different. Only 2-5% students got selected with an average package of 2-3 LPA. In my senior batch, only one student got placed.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is quite good. Wi-Fi is not working properly many times. There is no medical facility. A huge ground is available for sports, especially cricket matches. The food quality is average. It's better than Sinhagad institutions. The classrooms are good. The hostel rooms are good, but rent is more than general hostels. The college campus is 4km long from Kondhawa, and 1.5 km from Sinhgad Institutions which is actually located in Yewalewadi, Pune.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Homeopathic Medicine and Surgery (BHMS) - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with our college. It is the best campus ever.

review_content.Placements: There were only 40 students, out of which only 23 passed the exam. The ones who passed will get internships in different hospitals. The top roles are doctors, pharmacists, and compounders. The salary package will be Rs. 30,000 per month for an internship and Rs. 40, 000 per month for house staff.
review_content.Infrastructure: The classrooms are well-organised and clean. Great facilities are there. The food is provided in the hostel. There is an e-lab, a pathology lab, a computer lab, and a library. A pharmacy is also there, and the quality of the Wi-Fi is great. There is an air conditioner in the auditorium.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Homeopathic Medicine and Surgery (BHMS) - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: It provides good infrastructure and facilities.

review_content.Placements: Our college provides BHMS and MD courses for medical aspirant students. Admission is based on NEET UG merit ranking basis. The minimum qualification criteria are higher secondary, and students should be pass out from subjects like Physics, Chemistry and Biology with 50% marks. It is totally run by the government of West Bengal. According to the government fee scale, education cost depends here, and no extra charge is payable for students. All pass out students gets a chance to do an internship in home institution and other government institutions. Most of the students get a chance to enlist their names in the MD course.

All pass out students gets a chance to do an internship in home institution and other government institutions. Most of the students get a chance to enlist their names in the MD course.

highlights.summary: A leading institute in the city offers 25 courses of Degree. Maulana Azad University is a well-known institution for UG, PG and After 10th courses, These programs delivered by a highly experienced faculty. Maulana Azad University offers a range of UG, PG and After 10th courses, These courses are designed to provide students with the necessary skills and knowledge to chosen field. Candidate can pursue in multiple range of courses like B.A., M.A., B.Com, M.Com, B.Sc., BCA, B.E. / B.Tech, BBA, After 10th Diploma, MS, MPH, MBA/PGDM, M.Sc., M.Pharma, B.Pharma, D.Pharma with the stream of Humanities & Social Sciences, Accounting & Commerce, Science, IT & Software, Engineering, Business & Management Studies, Teaching & Education, Medicine & Health Sciences. Courses offered by the Institute are in the fee range of INR 68,500-221,000 for a total of 187 candidates. Most importantly, these courses with 187 seats are imparted at affordable fees with range of INR 68,500-221,000, which increase accessibility and allow students the opportunity to gain knowledge and skills in their chosen field.

answer.text: There are plenty of jobs for fresh Computer Science Engineering graduates. Candidates from top notch engineering colleges get attractive job offers from IT MNCs. CSE course graduates can also get jobs in non-IT companies like universities, research, private and public industries, government departments, business organisations, commercial organisations and the manufacturing sector, etc.You also have plenty of options to work in different departments such as design, development, assembly, manufacture and maintenance, etc. Working as programmer, web developer, and E- commerce specialist with telecommunications companies, automotive companies, aerospace companies, etc. can be a lucrative career option as well. Moreover, numerous national and multi-national computer manufacturing companies, computer hardware system design and development companies, computer networking companies, software development companies, etc. require computer professionals in large numbers.

overview_faqs.question: Is Computer Engineering a good choice for career?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, CSE (full form Computer Science and Engineering) is a good career choice if you are aspiring for a good salary package as a fresher. A Computer Engineering graduate's average salary in India is approx. INR 6 lakh and higher. Also, owing to the exponential rise in AI & ML concept), CSE course gradutes have got a competitive job market and abundant opportunities for career growth.

overview_faqs.question: What is the scope of healthcare management in India?
overview_faqs.answer: In India, Healthcare/Hospital Sector is in growing face because due to higher no. of population and area we need lot of hospital and best in practice and services. There are lot of institute which provides course in different fields related to Healthcare & Hospital sector. IIHMR Bangalore, for Maharashtra you can look for SGRR Group of Institutions Dehradun.Note: Info is taken from other sources and can be different.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Sumandeep College of Physiotherapy is an institute which offers various courses at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time programmes from stream such as Medicine & Health Sciences. At the UG level, students can choose the available programmes such as BPT. Talking about PG level, some of the available courses include MPT. The fee structure for the Sumandeep College of Physiotherapy programmes is around INR 2,80,000 to 4,60,000.

faqs.answer: A:    Sumandeep College of Physiotherapy provides programmes including MPT, BPT in streams such as Medicine & Health Sciences, and are excellent for students to build their careers.
faqs.question: Which courses does Sumandeep College of Physiotherapy offer?

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelors of Physiotherapy (BPT) - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with its good infrastructure and facilities.

review_content.Placements: This college of physiotherapy is good to study. It is a strict college as students will not be able to bunk classes because attendance is taken almost 3 times. As in Maharashtra, students require NEET to be qualified for any paramedical course. Students do not have to crack NEET, and they have to score well in 12th board exams. As it is a medical college so, there are no placements, and also internships are compulsory to do then only students will get a degree. Patient exposure is good. There are many patients students will see and learn so much.
review_content.Infrastructure: In this college, food is good, there are two stalls in the mess, one for Jain students, and another one is regular. Hostels are also better and there is an air-conditioner. Students can play sports in this college. The gym is also available. It provides one swimming pool, one pharmacy, and 2 canteens. The hospital is also available where patient exposure is good, and students will learn many things.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelors of Physiotherapy (BPT) - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: It is a good college for physiotherapy.

review_content.Placements: About 70% of students got placed from our course. The fee of our college is 1.5 per year. After this BPT, we do an internship, usually in Dhiraj hospital, with a moderate flow of patients. There is an opportunity for us to do our self-practice also.
review_content.Infrastructure: On our Sumandeep campus, there is a library, playground for cricket, a separate court for basketball, Nescafe and Wi-Fi. The classrooms are some kind of small to accommodate 115 students. The quality of the hostel provided here is good. There are separate hostel-wise wardens to solve our problems, and they are also cooperative. In the mess, the quality of food served is quite good. But the menu is not very good compared to the fee, which is Rs. 50,000 per year. There are good medical facilities like Dhiraj hospital is open 24x7.

review_summary.college_name: Sumandeep College of Physiotherapy Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelors of Physiotherapy (BPT) - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: The college was very good.

content.Placements: The number of students placed in the college in one batch were 120-130 students. The placement cell is not there in this college so no placements were given from here. Internship was there in the college itself as the university has it's own hospital.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure was good in the university campus. The facility of Wi-Fi was there in the college and was given on paid basis. There was good facility of the library. Hostel facility was there in the university and canteen services were good and good was also good.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelors of Physiotherapy (BPT) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Overall okay. Do what's best for you and ask for help whenever needed.

content.Placements: I don't know about that yet, but they provide internship for us in the hospital which is in our campus and they can provide the same for placement too and some hospitals from Gujarat who are affiliated with our college. All the students gain internships.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good, and there's a sports section built up some months back and has indoor games too with trainer and a gym. Library and classroom are good. Quality of food in mess is getting poorer from before, but overall it is nice. There is a canteen above mess and even a restaurant type thing where we can have meals.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelors of Physiotherapy (BPT) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with its good infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: This college of physiotherapy is good to study. It is a strict college as students will not be able to bunk classes because attendance is taken almost 3 times. As in Maharashtra, students require NEET to be qualified for any paramedical course. Students do not have to crack NEET, and they have to score well in 12th board exams. As it is a medical college so, there are no placements, and also internships are compulsory to do then only students will get a degree. Patient exposure is good. There are many patients students will see and learn so much.
content.Infrastructure: In this college, food is good, there are two stalls in the mess, one for Jain students, and another one is regular. Hostels are also better and there is an air-conditioner. Students can play sports in this college. The gym is also available. It provides one swimming pool, one pharmacy, and 2 canteens. The hospital is also available where patient exposure is good, and students will learn many things.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelors of Physiotherapy (BPT) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: It is a good college for physiotherapy.

content.Placements: About 70% of students got placed from our course. The fee of our college is 1.5 per year. After this BPT, we do an internship, usually in Dhiraj hospital, with a moderate flow of patients. There is an opportunity for us to do our self-practice also.
content.Infrastructure: On our Sumandeep campus, there is a library, playground for cricket, a separate court for basketball, Nescafe and Wi-Fi. The classrooms are some kind of small to accommodate 115 students. The quality of the hostel provided here is good. There are separate hostel-wise wardens to solve our problems, and they are also cooperative. In the mess, the quality of food served is quite good. But the menu is not very good compared to the fee, which is Rs. 50,000 per year. There are good medical facilities like Dhiraj hospital is open 24x7.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelors of Physiotherapy (BPT) - Batch of 2013
individual_reviews.title: I'm very satisfied with the college because of perfect knowledge and facilities provided.

content.Placements: There are 100 students in every class & the salary package offered in our course depends upon the percentage you got in 12th. The university itself provides internship. They also many high profile hospitals like Apollo Hospital, bankers hospital, Kashi Baa hospital, Baroda Heart Hospital offered us a job, and the pay level was also perfect for all doctor.
content.Infrastructure: You will get every facility on the campus itself. Labs are very clean and huge to perform any practical experiment. Classrooms are also very comfortable. Hostels are very clean, and the food served in the canteen is too tasty and healthy to eat. They use fresh food and fruits for any dishes.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: AECS Maruti College of Dental Sciences and Research Centre offers diverse programmes at UG and PG levels in Full Time mode. The offered programmes can be chosen from stream such as Medicine & Health Sciences. At the UG level, candidates have the provision to opt from courses such as BDS. Whereas, at PG level, AECS Maruti College of Dental Sciences and Research Centre offers courses such as MDS. AECS Maruti College of Dental Sciences and Research Centre fee structure for all the courses is around INR 3,83,232 to 20,43,582.

faqs.answer: A:    AECS Maruti College of Dental Sciences and Research Centre is a well-known institution for MDS, BDS courses, and these programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. AECS Maruti College of Dental Sciences and Research Centre has course specializations in Orthodontics, Oral and Maxillofacial Surgery, Prosthodontics, Periodontology.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: It's a very good college. All teachers are very good and helpful. It has a very good infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: Many students got placed in different hospitals. The salary offered varied around 1 lac per month. Top hospitals hire students. All students got internships. This college is very good in all aspects, so I suggest you take the admission.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very good here, and the food served is average. All facilities are available, and medical facilities are available. There are playgrounds like a basketball court, football ground and volleyball ground. A very good temple is available, and the campus is huge.

reviews_list.batch_info: BDS - Bachelor of Dental Surgery - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely amazing for aspiring dentists.

review_content.Placements: The salary package is around 5-6 Lacs for senior dentists for government sector. Many private companies visit the campus. The roles in my course are senior dental analyst or dental surgeon. Around 76-83% students didi internship.
review_content.Infrastructure: The labs are fully equipped with all necessary equipments. With adequate patient flow to keep the students active and sharpen their knowledge on a more practical level. The library and classrooms have great infrastructure having projectors to keep studying very lively and fun. The hostel is not that great if u feel homesick it's better to stay in some PG. The food is fine.

admission_process.title: AECS Maruti College of Dental Sciences and Research Centre Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: AECS Maruti College of Dental Sciences and Research Centre admissions are based on merit. The institute considers applications of candidates meeting the eligibility criteria.AECS Maruti College of Dental Sciences and Research Centreoffers courses at UG and PG levels. Some of the courses include BDS and MDS. Candidates can apply online for the preferred course.
The total tuition fees for UG courses isINR 3,83,232. Aspirants may also need to pay one-time caution deposit at the time of admission.
The institute offers UG courses for 5 years. PG courses are offered for 3 years.
